name: Medium
description: Read Medium stories and publications, search articles by topic or tag, retrieve author profiles, and fetch full post content via Medium's official API.

tools_summary.name: get_user
tools_summary.description: Get a Medium user's profile and publications

tools_summary.name: get_publications
tools_summary.description: List publications the authenticated user is a contributor to

tools_summary.name: create_post
tools_summary.description: Publish a new post on Medium (draft or published)

tools_summary.name: create_post_under_publication
tools_summary.description: Publish a post under a specific Medium publication

tools_summary.name: get_post
tools_summary.description: Retrieve a specific post by ID

setup_instructions:
1. Go to medium.com/me/settings → Integration tokens
2. Generate a new token and copy it
3. Set MEDIUM_INTEGRATION_TOKEN to the token value
Note: Medium's official API supports reading your own posts and creating/publishing new posts.
